title: Node Routing Config
description: Schema for sprk_playbooknode.sprk_configjson routing fields (chat-routing-redesign-r1 FR-14a / FR-14e). The C# source of truth is Sprk.Bff.Api.Models.Ai.NodeRoutingConfig (src/server/api/Sprk.Bff.Api/Models/Ai/NodeRoutingConfig.cs). If the NodeDestination enum changes in C#, this schema must update in lockstep. The wire-format values are kebab-case per NodeDestinationJsonConverter. Additional properties are permitted for forward-compatibility because sprk_configjson is a shared blob also read by DeliverOutputNodeExecutor (deliveryType, template, outputFormat, etc.).

destination.description: Per-node routing destination. Wire values match NodeDestinationJsonConverter. 'both' was added in chat-routing-redesign-r1 task 045 (FR-14a).

widgetType.description: Workspace widget type. Conditionally required when destination = 'workspace' or 'both' (enforced by NodeRoutingConfig.Validate at parse time, not by this schema).
